summary: Bulk Category Editor Audit Fixes - 8 bugs verified. All backend tests PASSED (9/9). Frontend UI verified working. Fixed 1 additional bug: line 3130 in SupplierProducts.js was using old path /supplier-products/bulk-update-field instead of /supplier-sync/products/bulk-update-field.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Bug 1 - POST /api/supplier-sync/products/bulk-update-field endpoint exists and works (was 404 before)
VERIFIED: Bug 2 - Endpoint correctly rejects disallowed fields with 400 status
VERIFIED: Bug 3 - Endpoint correctly rejects empty SKU list with 400 status
VERIFIED: Bug 4 - POST /api/products/detect-series uses admin display name (our_product_name) priority over series field
VERIFIED: Bug 5 - POST /api/supplier-sync/products/bulk-update-unified still works correctly
VERIFIED: Bug 6 - Frontend Admin page /admin/supplier-products loads correctly
VERIFIED: Bug 7 - Bulk Category Editor modal opens with all sections visible (Categories, Specifications, Filters)
VERIFIED: Bug 8 - 'Quick Generate All Series Descriptions' button exists and is visible
FIXED: Line 3130 in SupplierProducts.js - Changed /supplier-products/bulk-update-field to /supplier-sync/products/bulk-update-field (applyAllDescriptions function)
VERIFIED: Force Save button present in modal
VERIFIED: Preview & Apply button present in modal
VERIFIED: 'blu' color word added to colorWordsSet (line 2740)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test SKU D11197
context_for_next_testing_agent: 8 audit bugs verified fixed. New endpoint /api/supplier-sync/products/bulk-update-field created and working. All name priority fixes verified (our_product_name > display_name > name > product_name > series). Fixed additional bug in applyAllDescriptions function (line 3130) that was still using old endpoint path. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_bulk_category_audit_fixes.py can be run with: cd /app && REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://feature-verification-7.preview.emergentagent.com python -m pytest backend/tests/test_bulk_category_audit_fixes.py -v

verified_features.bug_2_disallowed_fields_rejected: PASS - Returns 400 for fields like 'price' not in allowed list
verified_features.bug_3_empty_skus_rejected: PASS - Returns 400 for empty SKU list
verified_features.bug_4_detect_series_name_priority: PASS - Uses our_product_name > display_name > name > series
verified_features.bug_7_bulk_category_modal: PASS - Modal opens with Categories, Specifications, Filters sections
verified_features.bug_8_quick_generate_button: PASS - 'Quick Generate All Series Descriptions' button visible and clickable

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: applyAllDescriptions function was using old path /supplier-products/bulk-update-field
